task: Add daily paper trading health report and repair IBKR 000660 protective stop

governance_bootstrap.summary: Trading runtime changes require real verification, no unapproved capital action, and exact commit/deploy reporting.
Completion requires runtime entrypoint verification, state-change evidence, and clean dirty-state handling.

changes: Added daily paper trading health report script.
Added Mac Mini LaunchAgent template for weekday health report execution.
Added KRX tick-size normalization for IBKR protective stop repair.
Restored IBKR paper protective stop coverage for 000660.
